rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 20, 2016. rulings.Case Title: ***TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY***GUARDIANSHIP OF DANIEL JOSEPH COLON JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order After Hearing Date February 11, 2016.
rulings.Rulings: The motion for reconsideration of the order after hearing dated February 11, 2016 is DENIED. Petitioner Symone Colon has cited no new facts, law, or circumstances that would provide an adequate basis for her motion. She has also failed to show why any facts, law or circumstances currently made were not made at an earlier time. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court and all parties / counsel by April 5, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
